steps.title: Target the comparison
steps.content: The student's goal is to compare the sizes of the Peloncillo-Pan Duro Mountains and the Big Hatchet Mountains. The relevant notes are their areas: 1,360 mi² and 65 mi².

steps.title: Reject off-task choices
steps.content: Choice A discusses many mountain ranges, not these two sizes. Choice C says size can vary but does not compare the two named ranges. Choice D defines sky islands instead of comparing areas.

steps.title: Compare both measurements
steps.content: The choice that states the Peloncillo-Pan Duro Mountains cover 1,360 mi² and the Big Hatchet Mountains cover 65 mi² directly shows which range is larger. The answer is B.
